page.title: Jet Ski Tours Marbella | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Book jet ski tours Marbella with Boat Rental Marbella. Ride a Sea-Doo GTX from €149 for 30 min. Free jet ski on Mangusta 80 charters. WhatsApp now.
data.summary: Jet ski tours Marbella from Puerto Banús. Ride a Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski (3 pax) or get a free jet ski on a Mangusta 80 charter. Prices from €149/30 min. Book via WhatsApp.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski: 3.4m, 3 pax, departs Puerto Banús
30-min jet ski tour from €149 per person
1-hour jet ski tour from €249 per person
Mangusta 80 charter (4h from €4,719) includes a free jet ski
All tours include life jacket, safety briefing, and insurance
Ride along the Marbella coastline past Río Verde and Cala del Faro
Book via WhatsApp — instant confirmation, no deposit needed
Maximum 3 persons per jet ski (including rider)

faq.q: Do I need a licence to ride a jet ski in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, Spanish law requires a valid PNB (Patrón de Navegación Básica) or equivalent licence to drive a jet ski. If you don't have one, you can ride as a passenger with a licensed skipper on your jet ski, or book a Mangusta 80 charter where the jet ski is included with a skipper.

faq.q: What is included in a jet ski tour?
faq.a: Every jet ski tour includes the Sea-Doo GTX, life jacket, safety briefing, fuel, and insurance. Our guides are licensed and know the best spots along the coast. You also get a bottle of water. No hidden fees — Spanish IVA (21%) is included.

faq.q: Can I take a passenger on the jet ski?
faq.a: Yes, the Sea-Doo GTX seats up to 3 persons (rider + up to 2 passengers). The total weight limit is 240 kg. Passengers must be at least 8 years old and wear a life jacket. The rider must hold a valid licence or be accompanied by a licensed skipper.

faq.q: How long do jet ski tours last?
faq.a: We offer 30-minute and 1-hour tours. For longer rides, you can combine with a Mangusta 80 charter (minimum 4 hours) which includes a free jet ski. That way you can ride for as long as you like while the yacht waits.

faq.q: Where do jet ski tours depart from?
faq.a: All jet ski tours depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. You'll meet us at the marina office 15 minutes before your slot. We'll do a quick safety briefing and then head out. The meeting point is easy to find — just WhatsApp us for exact directions.

faq.q: What is the best time of day for a jet ski tour?
faq.a: Morning slots (9:00–12:00) are calmer with flat water, ideal for beginners. Afternoon (14:00–18:00) has more boat traffic but warmer weather. Sunset tours (19:00–20:30) are stunning — you'll see the sun dip behind La Concha mountain. Book ahead as sunset slots sell out fast.

faq.q: Can I cancel or reschedule my jet ski booking?
faq.a: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule free of charge up to 24 hours before your tour. After that, we'll try to accommodate changes subject to availability. Bad weather? We'll reschedule or refund you fully — no questions asked.

faq.q: What areas do we ride through on a jet ski tour?
faq.a: Our standard route heads west from Puerto Banús towards Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés, then past the Golden Mile and Marbella Marina. Depending on sea conditions, we may extend to Cabopino or Estepona. Your guide will adapt to the weather and your skill level.

data.body_html:
Jet ski tours Marbella are the fastest way to experience the Costa del Sol coastline. From Puerto Banús, you can ride a Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski along the Golden Mile, past Marbella Marina, and out to Cala del Faro. Whether you want a quick 30-minute blast or a longer charter that includes a free jet ski, we have options for every budget. All tours include a licensed skipper (if required), life jacket, fuel, and insurance. No hidden fees.

Our Jet Ski Fleet

We operate a single model — the Sea-Doo GTX — because it's the most stable and powerful jet ski for Marbella waters. Here's the spec:

  • Length: 3.4m
  • Capacity: Up to 3 persons (rider + 2 passengers)
  • Engine: 1.5L Rotax, 1630 cc
  • Top speed: 55 knots (100 km/h)
  • Departure point: Puerto Banús

If you want a bigger group experience, consider our boat rental Marbella options — many of our yachts can tow a jet ski or include one free.

Jet Ski Tour Prices

All prices include VAT (21%), fuel, life jacket, safety briefing, and a bottle of water. No hidden extras.

DurationPriceCapacity
30 minutes€149Up to 3 pax
1 hour€249Up to 3 pax
Mangusta 80 charter (4h+)From €4,71912 pax + free jet ski

For the Mangusta 80 charter, you get a free jet ski included — perfect if you want to mix yacht luxury with jet ski thrills. See the Mangusta 80 page for details.

What to Expect on a Jet Ski Tour

Your tour starts at Puerto Banús. After a 10-minute safety briefing, you'll head west along the coast. The standard route takes you past:

  • Puerto Banús — the marina with its superyachts and designer boutiques
  • Río Verde — the green river mouth, a good spot for dolphin sightings
  • Cala del Faro — a small cove with a lighthouse, great for photos
  • Cala Cortés — a quieter beach, often less crowded
  • Marbella Marina — the old port with its fishing boats and chiringuitos
  • Golden Mile — the stretch of beach between Marbella and Puerto Banús

If sea conditions permit, your guide may extend the tour to Cabopino or even Estepona. The ride time is about 20–25 minutes each way, so you'll have plenty of time to open the throttle.

Jet Ski Licence Requirements

Spanish law requires a PNB (Patrón de Navegación Básica) or equivalent licence to drive a jet ski. If you don't have one, you can:

  • Ride as a passenger (no licence needed) — the guide drives
  • Book a Mangusta 80 charter with a free jet ski — the yacht's skipper can drive the jet ski while you ride

We can also arrange a short training session for an additional fee — just ask via WhatsApp.

Best Time for Jet Ski Tours in Marbella

Marbella enjoys over 300 sunny days a year, so you can ride almost any day. The sea temperature ranges from 15°C in winter to 25°C in summer. Here's a quick guide:

  • Morning (9:00–12:00): Flat water, fewer boats, cooler air (20–25°C in summer). Best for beginners.
  • Afternoon (14:00–18:00): Warmer (28–35°C), more boat traffic, but still great visibility.
  • Sunset (19:00–20:30): Stunning light, calm sea, and the sun setting behind La Concha mountain. Most popular slot — book early.

Winter (November–March) is quieter and cheaper, but sea conditions can be choppy. We only run tours when it's safe — your safety is our priority.

How to Book Your Jet Ski Tour

Booking is simple — just send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, time, and number of people. We'll confirm availability and send you the meeting point. No deposit needed; you pay on arrival.

For larger groups, consider a boat hire Marbella package that includes a jet ski — it often works out cheaper than separate bookings.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a licence to ride a jet ski in Marbella?

Yes, Spanish law requires a valid PNB (Patrón de Navegación Básica) or equivalent licence to drive a jet ski. If you don't have one, you can ride as a passenger with a licensed skipper on your jet ski, or book a Mangusta 80 charter where the jet ski is included with a skipper.

What is included in a jet ski tour?

Every jet ski tour includes the Sea-Doo GTX, life jacket, safety briefing, fuel, and insurance. Our guides are licensed and know the best spots along the coast. You also get a bottle of water. No hidden fees — Spanish IVA (21%) is included.

Can I take a passenger on the jet ski?

Yes, the Sea-Doo GTX seats up to 3 persons (rider + up to 2 passengers). The total weight limit is 240 kg. Passengers must be at least 8 years old and wear a life jacket. The rider must hold a valid licence or be accompanied by a licensed skipper.

How long do jet ski tours last?

We offer 30-minute and 1-hour tours. For longer rides, you can combine with a Mangusta 80 charter (minimum 4 hours) which includes a free jet ski. That way you can ride for as long as you like while the yacht waits.

Where do jet ski tours depart from?

All jet ski tours depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. You'll meet us at the marina office 15 minutes before your slot. We'll do a quick safety briefing and then head out. The meeting point is easy to find — just WhatsApp us for exact directions.

What is the best time of day for a jet ski tour?

Morning slots (9:00–12:00) are calmer with flat water, ideal for beginners. Afternoon (14:00–18:00) has more boat traffic but warmer weather. Sunset tours (19:00–20:30) are stunning — you'll see the sun dip behind La Concha mountain. Book ahead as sunset slots sell out fast.

Can I cancel or reschedule my jet ski booking?

Yes, you can cancel or reschedule free of charge up to 24 hours before your tour. After that, we'll try to accommodate changes subject to availability. Bad weather? We'll reschedule or refund you fully — no questions asked.

What areas do we ride through on a jet ski tour?

Our standard route heads west from Puerto Banús towards Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés, then past the Golden Mile and Marbella Marina. Depending on sea conditions, we may extend to Cabopino or Estepona. Your guide will adapt to the weather and your skill level.
